title: Fields values in automations
excerpt:

posts.author: Soroh (Soroh Donn)
posts.cookedHtml:
When using automations such as moving an item to another group, we should be able to select a field value to indicate what group to move it to.
For example, when user is assigned, I should be able to move the item to a group for that user. So, using an automation I have the ability to create the group using another field value, but we don’t currently have the option on moving the item to that group, by indicating the field value.
Please add this feature.

posts.author: kaylak (Kayla K)
posts.cookedHtml:
If the group is already created, would this automation work? Or are you trying to create an automation that creates a group and moves an item to that group based on a certain condition at the same time?

image1279×304 12.5 KB

posts.author: Soroh (Soroh Donn)
posts.cookedHtml: The issue with this is that you need to select the group, and can’t map it to another field value.
